markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard Alice to the user manual creation process using the onboarding tool.](https://fathom.video/share/J5zXaLYiKf3-v8JtT95Zxz3GfZUzRdvy?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [The onboarding tool automates account creation for new users, but can be manually triggered for off-cycle onboarding](https://fathom.video/share/J5zXaLYiKf3-v8JtT95Zxz3GfZUzRdvy?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)
  - [Process involves refreshing data, selecting users, and authenticating via Slack](https://fathom.video/share/J5zXaLYiKf3-v8JtT95Zxz3GfZUzRdvy?tab=summary&timestamp=13.0)
  - [Some technical issues occurred during the demo, but were resolved](https://fathom.video/share/J5zXaLYiKf3-v8JtT95Zxz3GfZUzRdvy?tab=summary&timestamp=459.0)
  - [Automatic onboarding happens Thursdays at 9am PST for users starting within the next week](https://fathom.video/share/J5zXaLYiKf3-v8JtT95Zxz3GfZUzRdvy?tab=summary&timestamp=1079.0)

## Topics

### Onboarding Tool Overview and Access

  - [Located in Slack's onboarding channel under bookmarks](https://fathom.video/share/J5zXaLYiKf3-v8JtT95Zxz3GfZUzRdvy?tab=summary&timestamp=31.0)
  - [Requires authentication (Slack or email) for access](https://fathom.video/share/J5zXaLYiKf3-v8JtT95Zxz3GfZUzRdvy?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
  - [Only listed individuals can use the tool](https://fathom.video/share/J5zXaLYiKf3-v8JtT95Zxz3GfZUzRdvy?tab=summary&timestamp=174.0)
  - [Authentication link valid for 15 minutes](https://fathom.video/share/J5zXaLYiKf3-v8JtT95Zxz3GfZUzRdvy?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)

### Onboarding Process Steps

  - [Refresh onboarding list to fetch latest data from Deal](https://fathom.video/share/J5zXaLYiKf3-v8JtT95Zxz3GfZUzRdvy?tab=summary&timestamp=83.0)
  - [Select "Onboard user now" option](https://fathom.video/share/J5zXaLYiKf3-v8JtT95Zxz3GfZUzRdvy?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)
  - [Choose user(s) to onboard (multiple selections possible)](https://fathom.video/share/J5zXaLYiKf3-v8JtT95Zxz3GfZUzRdvy?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)
  - [Verify user information before proceeding](https://fathom.video/share/J5zXaLYiKf3-v8JtT95Zxz3GfZUzRdvy?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)
  - [Tool automates account creation across platforms (Google, Okta, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/J5zXaLYiKf3-v8JtT95Zxz3GfZUzRdvy?tab=summary&timestamp=70.0)

### Automated vs. Manual Onboarding

  - [Automatic onboarding occurs Thursdays at 9am PST for users starting within a week](https://fathom.video/share/J5zXaLYiKf3-v8JtT95Zxz3GfZUzRdvy?tab=summary&timestamp=1082.0)
  - [Manual onboarding needed for:](https://fathom.video/share/J5zXaLYiKf3-v8JtT95Zxz3GfZUzRdvy?tab=summary&timestamp=1091.0)
    1.  Users requiring earlier access
    2.  Late additions starting before next automatic cycle

### Technical Issues and Troubleshooting

  - [Error encountered: "Entity already exists"](https://fathom.video/share/J5zXaLYiKf3-v8JtT95Zxz3GfZUzRdvy?tab=summary&timestamp=467.0)
  - [Possible causes discussed (manual creation, system quirk)](https://fathom.video/share/J5zXaLYiKf3-v8JtT95Zxz3GfZUzRdvy?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)
  - [Issue resolved, but exact cause unclear](https://fathom.video/share/J5zXaLYiKf3-v8JtT95Zxz3GfZUzRdvy?tab=summary&timestamp=532.0)
  - [Welcome email delivery delayed, but eventually received](https://fathom.video/share/J5zXaLYiKf3-v8JtT95Zxz3GfZUzRdvy?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)

### Welcome Email Process

  - [System generates and sends welcome email automatically](https://fathom.video/share/J5zXaLYiKf3-v8JtT95Zxz3GfZUzRdvy?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)
  - [Email content includes standard welcome message and onboarding information](https://fathom.video/share/J5zXaLYiKf3-v8JtT95Zxz3GfZUzRdvy?tab=summary&timestamp=864.0)
  - [Delay in email delivery observed during demo](https://fathom.video/share/J5zXaLYiKf3-v8JtT95Zxz3GfZUzRdvy?tab=summary&timestamp=730.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Alice to monitor for welcome email arrival and notify Yousef if not received](https://fathom.video/share/J5zXaLYiKf3-v8JtT95Zxz3GfZUzRdvy?tab=summary&timestamp=793.0)
  - [Alice to use the onboarding tool for off-cycle onboarding requests](https://fathom.video/share/J5zXaLYiKf3-v8JtT95Zxz3GfZUzRdvy?tab=summary&timestamp=1042.0)
  - [Yousef to investigate the cause of the "Entity already exists" error](https://fathom.video/share/J5zXaLYiKf3-v8JtT95Zxz3GfZUzRdvy?tab=summary&timestamp=703.0)
  - [Consider creating a Loom video for the onboarding process](https://fathom.video/share/J5zXaLYiKf3-v8JtT95Zxz3GfZUzRdvy?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
